observations: Aerial imagery is available, but AI analysis was not run for this report.
Large low-slope roof area should be reviewed for membrane wear, drainage, staining, and penetration condition.
Use the selected aerial image as the primary visual reference for field validation.
summary: This preliminary report was generated from parcel/building data and aerial imagery. AI roof observations were not requested or no API key was available, so condition values are conservative placeholders for layout and workflow validation.
recommendation: Run AI image analysis and perform field inspection before final assessment.
